title: There Is A Mouse In The House

sentences.text: written by rachel rice illustrated by laura zaryn focus question how do you know what animal will come next in the story
there is a mouse in the house
there is a bee in the tea
there is a bat on the hat
there is a pup in the cup
there is a bug on the rug
there is a fox in the box
there is a goat on the boat
there is a bear in the air

connections writing and art think of an animal not in this story complete this rhyme there is a in the draw a picture for your rhyme science where can the animals in this book be found in nature share your ideas with a partner
